subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the horizon of power, verily He is the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Book through which all mysteries have been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من افق الاقتدار انه هو السر المکنون و الکتاب المخزون به ظهرت الأسرار
